programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now face off in the pressure test elimination. The contestants have to recreate an ice cream float with helium-filled toffee balloon.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The three best-performing contestants from the invention test compete for immunity. Each contestant has 90 minutes to create a dessert while the professional chefs will only have 75 minutes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Contestants will be working in teams to build an edible art installation in a specially constructed greenhouse. With just 8 hours to impress the judges which team will be safe from elimination?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The losing team from the greenhouse challenge now face elimination. The first three to fail the blind-fold taste test will have 75 minutes to prepare an impressive dish to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to create a delicious dish from the mystery box of traditional Thai ingredients to gain advantage in the invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook off in a three hour pressure test set by 2016's Chef of The Year. Who will impress and who has cooked their last dish in the competition?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test battle it out for the chance to cook for an immunity pin. Will the amateur contestant have what it takes to out-cook a professional?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Each team must serve two dishes in one of four market-friendly ways at the famous South Melbourne Market. The two teams that make the least amount of money will face off in an elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Eight contestants now face elimination and must survive three rounds if they are to keep their food dream alive. Will one of the top contenders fail to impress the judges?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Master of Mediterranean cuisine, Yotam Ottolenghi's mystery box challenge gives contestants 75 minutes to create a delicious dish to gain an advantage going into the invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test must cook off to avoid elimination in a pressure test set by the master of Mediterranean cuisine, Yotam Ottolenghi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test must first face off for a chance to cook against a professional chef for immunity. Does an amateur have what it takes to defeat a professional?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Split into two teams, each group must prepare a Yotam Ottolenghi-style vegetarian feast for a group of meat lovers. The team that serves the least impressive feast will be up for elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: The seven members of the losing team from the vegetarian feast challenge are facing elimination. Which favourite will be going home? Plus, a very special Yotam Ottolenghi MasterClass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Contestants have an hour to create a delicious dish from ingredients found in the Mystery Box set by international celebrity chef, Curtis Stone.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the invention test must now cook off in the Pressure Test set by one of the world's top chocolatiers to avoid elimination. Who will be next to leave the competition?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 33
programme.desc: 12 of the previously eliminated contestants now have a chance to cook their way back into the competition. Which one of the home cooks will secure themselves a second chance?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 34
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia 2016 runner-up Matt Sinclair is on hand to mentor contestants in a pop-up restaurant team challenge to create a three-course menu for 100 diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 35
programme.desc: The six members of the losing team from the pop-up restaurant challenge enter the kitchen facing elimination. Who will be the next contestant to leave the competition?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 36
programme.desc: It's Heston Blumenthal week on MasterChef Australia! Heston takes the top 12 contestants on a road trip through regional Victoria, first stop is the mighty Murray River in Swan Hill.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cloncurry in North West Queensland where the ultimate battle between Brains and Brawn begins. As soon as the Castaways hit the red dirt, it's every man for themselves to win the first reward challenge

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: It's a new day, settling into camp, Sleeping rough has taken it's toll. With Immunity Idols hidden around both the Brains and Brawn camps, the race is on for Castaways to get their hands on them first

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cracks & alliances have started to appear in both the Brains and Brawn camps. The split amongst one Tribe is evident at Tribal Council but with a hidden Immunity Idol at play, will things go to plan?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After last Tribal Council, the minority group in the Brawn Tribe realize they're in a dangerous position and work to better their alliances. Then, at a tense Tribal Council, one Castaway is eliminated

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: One lucky Castaway who currently holds an immunity idol finds another. And later, battlelines are drawn at another intense Tribal Council, that lands on a surprising outcome.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both Tribes begin to struggle with the harsh reality of the Aussie outback. Tensions are high and tears are shed at an emotional Tribal Council. But all is not what it seems.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Our hungry Castaways walk into the BBQ Feast Reward Challenge. Then, when one Tribe enters the ring for the Immunity Challenge, tensions flair with a Castaway forced to sit out and watch how it's done

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tongues start to wag in both camps with ousted Castaways revealing who is in possession of Hidden Immunity Idols, hoping to flush them out. Then, it's blindside time at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When winning Reward also doubles as winning Immunity, all bets are off, especially when the winners will also score champagne and bar snacks. With both Tribes attending Tribal Council, fireworks ensue

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: One Tribe thinks they have it in the bag, but a surprise outcome means full bellies and a good night's sleep for the overall winners. With firm alliances rearing their head at a heated Tribal council

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Even when you think your private conversation won't be heard by others, it almost always is. The other Castaways use the overheard information to their advantage amongst their own Tribal alliance.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Desperation is setting in on one Tribe with members gunning for one person in particular. Now to flush their idol! And a good old fashioned blindside sees one Castaway scratching their head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the moment the remaining Castaways have been waiting for, Tribe merge! Not everyone knows who to trust and with a couple of Idols in play, tonight's Tribal Council is anyone's game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an Immunity Challenge with a twist, there are three Immunity Idols up for grabs. Whoever scores one will see Tribal Council will swing in their favour...or will it?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The Immunity Challenge tests our hangry Castaways on spelling and balancing, with a challenge beast setting their eyes on the prize. Plus, At Tribal Council, a double agent is outed!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tensions within Brawn start a double blindside, but there's an importance in a blindside of picking the right target at the right time.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's Day 34 in the Australian Outback, and the feeling at camp is excitement for Brains, who now rule the camp.The biggest KEY to playing Survivor is to keep your closest allies safe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: George and Cara have stuck by each other through thick and thin, however, when the rest of the Tribe realise, will the King and Queen of Survivor's reign be over?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 614
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Things are looking rocky between Charlotte and Josh. Will Josh finally ask Charlotte to be his girlfriend, or will he leave her with no choice but to end their relationship for good? (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: For nearly 20 years, T&T Supermarket dominated sales, but now competition is “cut throat”. That's good enough reason for Tina Lee, the boss of T&T Supermarket, to swap her upscale lifestyle for a week working undercover in her own stores.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The CEO of Canadian restaurant chain East Side Mario’s finds out what it’s really like for the Average Joe when he steps away from financial management to spend a week working undercover in his own kitchens

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: While undercover as an entry-level employee, the President and COO of Waste Management, Larry O'Donnell is fired for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Working undercover in his own company, Coby Brooks, President and CEO of Hooters is shocked to learn that his company may have a negative public perception.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Former Army man, Joe DePinto, now President and CEO of 7Eleven, goes undercover to work on his company's front lines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Todd Ricketts, one of the owners of the Chicago Cubs, goes undercover within one of baseball's most famous franchises and fights for the chance to redeem himself after being let go on the second day.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 57

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 2
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 31

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 49

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 45

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 14

programme.desc: Phil Spector, dubbed the mad genius of rock n roll had a penchant for guns. When police are called to his mansion

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4

programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Stripes are searching for the Wishing Wheel: a magical treasure that will grant a wish for one lucky race car. But with chomping, stomping, and slithering dangers at every turn, can Blaze and his friends stay on track?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shimmer and Shine fall for Zeta's bottle trap! Leah and the pets must figure out how to save them. It's the Zahramay Falls Magic Carpet Race! Shimmer, Shine, Leah, and Zeta all compete for the prized genie gem.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 998
programme.desc: Dora's Fairytale Adventure: Dora and Boots are exploring in the forest when they discover the gate to Fairy-Tale Land and enter this magical place. But...there's a mean witch who lives in Fairy-Tale Land.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 25
programme.desc: When Uzma takes the magic jewel that powers Zeacorn Cove, the girls and their new Zeacorns friends set out to retrieve it. The girls and Arabella discover new magic in a secret cave, but trouble arises when Zeta takes the magic for herself.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand new monster machine named Watts – a super fast truck with electric tires! But when one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: Happy Birthday, Super Babies!: It's the Twins' 1st birthday and Dora reads them a very special Super Babies story. Once upon a time, there was a Cake-snatching Bear who stole all the cakes from the birthday boys and girls.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 719
programme.desc: Dora and Diego's Amazing Animal Circus Adventure: Join Dora and Diego on an adventure to see Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus, featuring Perrito, the kitties, Tico, Isa, Benny, and lots more animal friends!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Astronauts Leah and Zac are on a quest to speak to an alien through their walkie talkies. When Leah wishes to be able to talk to one, Shimmer and Shine poof an alien into her backyard, where she can talk to one face to face!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 996
programme.desc: Dora's World Adventure: All over the world, everyone's celebrating Friendship Day! But when Swiper mistakenly swipes all the special glowing Friendship Bracelets, Dora needs to team up with him to bring them back to the Friendship Parades.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 18

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 17

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The girls meet the Dream Genie and her apprentice, who have the power to make dreams come true. / Samira gives the kids a tour of the magical rooms in her palace, where she makes wishing items for Leah's world.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and lots of spectators have gathered to watch herds of dinosaurs march through Axle City! But when Crusher pushes his way into the parade, he scatters dinos everywhere, and it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Zeg to find and rescue them.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 710
programme.desc: Little Map: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures. And he's getting really good, so today he's ready for his very first treasure adventure!

programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As the girls search for Leah's lost necklace, an underground creature finds it and begins making wishes with it. / After Zac wishes to stay in Zahramay Falls forever, the kids search for a powerful genie to reverse the wish.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine meet a mermaid and explore her underwater world. Shimmer, Shine, and Leah explore an ice palace in their search for a magical gem.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for more doll friends for her genies to play with in her new dollhouse, she didn't mean for the genies to shrink themselves down to doll-size! Another wish causes Leah to shrink by mistake too

programme.desc: SpongeBob can't stand it when Patrick won't tell what's in his box, in 'The Secret Box', and then in 'Band Geeks', Squidward, SpongeBob and the gang form their own marching band.

programme.desc: Undergrowth, the ghost of all things plant-like and vegetative has taken over Amity Park - and turned everyone into plants. Danny must develop a new power to save Amity Park.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Craig teaches Sanjay the art of being a snake. Sanjay and Craig's actions in the present affect a future episode from"season twelve."

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig infiltrate the hospital to see the world’s first butt transplant. Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the ultimate laugh.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: After ruining Lundgren’s Huggle Day celebration, Sanjay and Craig set out to right their wrong — with the help of movie hero Dolph Lundgren. Led by Dolph Lundgren, Sanjay and Craig journey to find Huggle Bunny.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 224
programme.desc: For Halloween Lincoln and Clyde have scoped out a fancy neighborhood to make their dreams of scoring full size candy bars a reality. Meanwhile, Lucy is putting on a haunted maze and the younger girls scheme to get maximum candy.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The kids stage a Tufflips movie-marathon, but staying awake through every cheesy flick proves tougher than they expected. Craig is desperate for cuddling after he sees the neighborhood pets receiving so much tender affection.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sanjay grows giant calf muscles and joins a peculiar police force. Craig risks his life to help his best bud find a frozen treasure.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship when it comes to board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down. When Mom and Dad meet a new accomplished family they worry that their kids aren't doing enough activities to ensure a successful future.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: A Crustmas Story: SwaySway and Buhdeuce stay up all night waiting for Santa Crust to come - while reading each other quazy holiday stories and singing Crustmas Carols.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tufflips hosts a spooky, strange and shoddy half-hour Halloween special.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce babysit in 'Adventures in Big Baby Bun Sitting', and then in 'Crumbskull', the guys accidentally feed Ketta Dunce Bread just when her smartness is needed to save the planet.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the kids eat candy that makes good things taste bad forever, they set out on a quest to find an antidote. A cool bass player who lives in an underground convenience store threatens to break up Sanjay and Craig's friendship.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy creates a machine that zaps his intelligence away in order to fit in, while his missing brains are needed to stop a meteor aimed at Retroville. Jimmy builds a candy selling robot salesman who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce deliver bread to the bad part of Duck Town in 'Thug Loaf', and then in 'Mine All Mine', they meet the most righteous dude in the planet - the Bread Maker!

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce sneak into a girls-only summer camp in 'Love Loaf', and then in 'Beach Day... of Horror', they head to the beach and nothing can ruin their day, not even a monster!

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce find the mean-spirited Pizzawinners have an even more mean-spirited boss in 'Wrath of the Pizza Lord', then in 'Shrunken Ducks', SwaySway and Buhdeuce must hide from Rambamboo.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The dudes go undercover with Tufflips to investigate a crime ring that's pirating action hero's movies. Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the top of a lawyer's head from a roadside billboard advertisement.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jimmy returns from an excavation on the Twonkus-3 comet with a small furry creature burrowed in his soil samples that have a rather violent reaction to music.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Megan disguises herself as a tomboy to unwittingly convince Sanjay to be her partner at a dance competition. Sanjay, Craig, and Hector con their way into a rad-awesome skate crew.

programme.desc: Fairy Con/The Hungry Games: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies’ magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 6

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 76

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tour de Pond/Teacher's Strike: After happening upon a snotty rich kid named, Rex, who is legendary for winning the annual toy boat race, Arnold and Gerald decide to enter the race.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 80

programme.desc: Cosmonopoly/Hero Hound: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

programme.desc: Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School (who’s shaped like a triangle) while participating in the Spellementary School play, "Mr. Cookie’s Happy Day."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 6

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Wishy Washy/Poof's Play Date: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car! Wanda worries that Poof doesn’t have interaction with other fairy babies, so Timmy turns the adult fairies into babies, so Poof can play with.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 8

programme.desc: The Odd Squad/For Emergencies Only: Timmy wishes he had a talking car. Cosmo and Wanda are so busy with Poof they’re neglecting Timmy.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When their mother gives birth to two new children, Norbert and Daggett are forced to leave the family dam and build their own.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 78

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 5

programme.desc: Daggett saves cereal box-tops to get a street sweeper. Spawning salmon invade the beavers' lake.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 31

programme.desc: Timmy wishes for super Magician powers to perform at his parents' booth during the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 2
